title: Colony PCR Protocol
author: 宏亮 董
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.7h2hj8e

steps.instruction: Pick colonies as the template for colony PCR. The number picked for each plate depends on the difference between the positive and negative controls. %s %s 2×high Taq Master Mix (Enzyme) 5 μl Template 0.4 μl Forward Primer (10 μM) 0.4μl Reverse Primer (10 μM) 0.4 μl ddH2O 3.8 μl Fill the rest with water.

substeps.instruction: Pick colonies as the template for colony PCR. The number picked for each plate depends on the difference between the positive and negative controls. %s %s 2×high Taq Master Mix (Enzyme) 5 μl Template
μl Forward Primer (10 μM) 0.4μl Reverse Primer (10 μM)
μl Fill the rest with water.

steps.instruction: Test digest performed and products analysed using agarose gel electrophoresis to confirm if correct construct was present.
Use colony PCR to enlarge colony numbers. Then only the positive clones were mini-prepped.
